top_10_by_effect_size.rationale: Top 10 features by Cohen's d effect size
top_10_by_effect_size.expected_performance: Best predictive power, may have some redundancy

low_vif_high_effect.rationale: Features with VIF<5 and effect size>0.2 (low multicollinearity, strong signal)
low_vif_high_effect.expected_performance: Good balance of predictive power and independence

minimal_redundancy.rationale: Greedy selection to minimize correlation while maximizing effect size
minimal_redundancy.expected_performance: Maximum feature independence, moderate predictive power
